title: Luffy Tries to Join Shanks’ Crew
description: On pages 8–11, this part follows the Romance Dawn flashback and focuses on how Luffy’s pirate dream is formed through Shanks, Higuma, and the straw hat promise.
scene: Young Luffy tries to prove he belongs with Shanks’ pirates, but the adults around him treat his dream as reckless.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A small harbor village

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ONE YEAR AGO...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...A pirate ship made the village its base.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE WIND BLOWS FROM THE EAST.

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy! WHAT'RE YOU UP TO NOW?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: HMPH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And the village is at peace.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I've had it with you guys!! Now you'll have to take me seriously!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is how tough I am!!!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: HAHA HA! GET IT OVER WITH!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: WHAT- EVER IT IS...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's that pup up to now?

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: Huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: AARGH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: YOU IDIOT! WHAT'D YOU DO THAT FOR!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: YEOM!!!

dialogue.speaker: Higuma
dialogue.text: A TOAST!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: to Luffy's... Courage...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Courage...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND TO OUR GREAT VOYAGE!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: HAR HAR HAR HAR HAR! DRINK UP!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: GROG! Grog! Grog! MORE GROG!

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: hey that's MY meat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: NOT ANY MORE! I'm gonna eat it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, stop fighting! You'll spoil our fun!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: IT DIDN'T HURT A BIT!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: LIAR! that was a foolish thing to do!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm not the least bit afraid of getting hurt!!! Take me with you on your next voyage!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I wanna be a pirate too!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: you?! a pirate?! impossible!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Luffy, do you know why we call you "Anchor"? Because you can't swim--you just sink!! What good is a pirate who can't swim?

dialogue.speaker: Makino
dialogue.text: BUT IF I DON'T FALL OVERBOARD, THEN IT DOESN'T MATTER IF I'M AN ANACHOR!!

summary: Luffy tries to prove he is ready for the sea, but Shanks and the others treat him like a child. The scene establishes both Luffy’s stubbornness and Shanks’ protective distance.
